Name: ChatJump
Description: One-tap shortcuts to open favorite WhatsApp and Telegram chats. Each key jumps straight to a specific conversation, showing the contact photo and name.

Localization.Enter the number in international format: Enter the number in international format (with country code). WhatsApp Desktop or WhatsApp must be installed.
Localization.Username opens public handles (@name). P: Username opens public handles (@name). Phone works only for contacts already in your Telegram. Telegram Desktop must be installed.
